reviews.name: 테****
reviews.content: 낚시대 장난감 좋아라는데 이렇게 귀여운건 첨이에요😆 줄이 고무줄이라서 약올리기 좋고 더 좋아해요ㅋㅋ
reviews.content_en: My puppy loves fishing rod toys, but this is the cutest one I've ever seen! 😆 The string is made of rubber so it's great for teasing, and she loves it even more haha

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
졸귀 게랑 문어중에 고민하다가 흥미잃으면 
간식 끼울려고 문어 선택했어요 ㅋㅋㅋ
근데 제가 흔들어주는건 크게 안즐거워하고 
장난감통에 꽂아놓으니 혼자 신나서 흔들어재낌(?)ㅋㅋㅋ
reviews.content_en: I was torn between an adorable crab and octopus, but I chose the octopus so I could stuff treats in it haha. But when I shake it, she doesn't enjoy it much, but when I stick it in the toy basket, she gets all excited and shakes it herself (?) lol

reviews.name: 신****
reviews.content: 진짜 좋아해요.. 너무 잘 가지고 놀아요… ㅠㅠ 이런 장난감을 원했습니다!!!
reviews.content_en: She really loves it.. plays with it so well… ㅠㅠ This is exactly the kind of toy I wanted!!!

reviews.name: 조****
reviews.content:
집에서 놀아주려고 구매했어요😊
낚싯대 타입이라 제가 살짝만 흔들어줘도 장난감이 자연스럽게
움직여서 강아지 흥미를 잘 끌어줍니다.
특히 핑크 인형 부분에 반응이 좋아서 집중해서 쳐다보고 점프하려고 하더라고요ㅎㅎ
줄 길이도 적당하고 가벼워서 손목 부담 없이 놀아줄 수 있는 점이
좋았습니다. 소재도 부드러운 편이라 입으로 물고 놀기에도 괜찮아보여요.다만 너무 세게 당기면 끈이 떨어질까봐 적당히 텐션 조절하면서 놀아주는 게 좋을 것 같아요ㅎㅎ전체적으로 가격 대비 만족스럽고, 활동량 많은 강아지 놀이용으로 추천합니다👍
reviews.content_en: I got this to play with her at home 😊 Since it's a fishing rod type, even just a light shake from me makes the toy move naturally and really catches my dog's attention. She especially responds well to the pink figure part and stares intently while trying to jump hehe. The string length is just right and it's lightweight, so I can play without straining my wrist, which is great. The material is soft too, so it looks okay for her to bite and play with. Though I'd recommend adjusting the tension moderately when pulling so the string doesn't break hehe. Overall I'm satisfied with the price, and I recommend it for dogs with high activity levels 👍

reviews.name: 홍밥풀
reviews.content:
낚시대 장난감 사주고 싶어서 다이소 기웃기웃 거렸는데.. 요런 요물템이 바잇미에 출시되었다니!!😍

평소에 손 장난이나 움직이는 장난감을 너무나도 좋아하는 강아지에게 최고의 장난감이에요!🪼
반동도 적당해서 쭉쭉 늘어나니까 보호자인 저도 재밌게 놀 수 있고 강아지도 재밌게 놀 수 있네요 ㅎㅎ

특히 줄까 말까 장난치면서 괴롭히는 게 왜이리 잼나는지...^^

가끔 TV보거나 핸드폰 할 때 공 던져주는 게 사알~짝 힘들 때도 있었는데 이거는 제 할 일 하면서 한 손으로 낚싯대 흔들어주면서 놀아주면 되니까 너무 좋은 것 같아요 ㅎㅎ
신박한 장난감 요거 왕 추천합니다!!👍
reviews.content_en: I kept wandering around the dollar store wanting to get a fishing rod toy.. but BITE ME released something like this?! 😍 For a dog who absolutely loves hand play and moving toys, this is the best toy ever! 🪼 The recoil is moderate and it stretches nicely, so even I as the owner can have fun playing with it, and my dog has fun too hehe. Especially why is it so fun to tease by saying 'string or no string...' ^^ Sometimes when I'm watching TV or on my phone, throwing a ball feels exhausting, but with this I can just shake it with one hand while doing my things, so it's amazing hehe. Seriously recommending this innovative toy!! 👍

reviews.name: 신****
reviews.content: 10살이 무색하게 혈기왕성한 저희아이에게 딱 맞는 장난감이에요>_< 예전에 고양이 전용 낚시대 사줬는데 아무래도 금방 헤져서 버리게 되더라구요.. .ᐟ 댕댕이 전용 낚시대라니 너무 귀엽고 생각보다 견고한거 같아요.ᐟ 부디 끊어지지 않고 오래오래 쓰면 좋겠어요~ 나중에 다른 모양도 재구매 할거에요.ᐟ.ᐟ.ᐟ  바잇미 장난감이 젤 귀여운거 같아요 ♡̷⁺
reviews.content_en: For our 10-year-old who's still full of energy, this is the perfect toy >_< I got a cat fishing rod before but it wore out quickly so I had to throw it away.. A dog-specific fishing rod is so cute and seems sturdier than I expected. I hope it lasts a long time without breaking~ I'll definitely repurchase different designs later. BITE ME toys are the cutest ones ever ♡̷⁺

reviews.name: 배로
reviews.content:
긴 설명 필요 없이 사진만 보시면 아시겠죠....
물고 당기고 끈으로 노는 거 좋아하는 강아지인데 역시나 엄청 잘 가지고 놀아요! 탄성도 쭈우우욱 늘어나고 돌아온답니다.
뻭삑이까지 있어서 놀다가 눌려지면 소리 나서 더 흥미 있어 해요! 앉거나 누워서 놀아줄 수 있으니 주인이 더 편한 건 비밀😏
reviews.content_en: No long explanation needed—you'll understand just by looking at the pictures... My dog loves biting, pulling, and playing with strings, and she absolutely loves this! The elasticity stretches nicely and bounces back. It even has a squeaker, so when she plays and presses it, it makes a sound which makes her even more interested! The fact that you can play while sitting or lying down is a secret bonus for the owner 😏

reviews.name: 감자엄마
reviews.content:
평소 고양이 낚시대로 잘 놀던 강아지인데, 바잇미에서 드디어!! 강아지용 낚시대를 출시해서 완전 만족하면서 사용중이에요~
서서 혹은 앉아서 우리 강아지와 놀아줄수 있어서 너무 좋았고 뭔가 디용대용하면서 강아지의 시선을 엄청 끌수 있서서 너무 좋아하네요!
끝에 달려있는 게친구도 너무 귀엽고 너무 신박한 장난감 강추입니다!!
reviews.content_en: My dog used to play well with cat fishing rods, but BITE ME finally released a dog fishing rod and I'm so satisfied using it~ I love that I can play with my dog while standing or sitting, and somehow it really grabs the dog's attention! The little friend at the end is so cute and this is seriously an innovative toy—highly recommended!!

reviews.name: 유****
reviews.content:
디자인도 너무 예쁘고, 내구성도 너무 좋은데요
너무 저희 강아지가 안 가지고 노네요...
용돈 아껴서 사 준 건데 너무 속상해요...
결국 고양이 집사 친구에게 줘버렸어요^.ㅜ

삑삑, 바스락, 공놀이 너무 좋아하는 강아지인데, 이건
점프해서 물어도 삑삑 소리 나기 어렵고, 바스락은 없어사 굳이 뛰어다니기 가성비가 적다고 생각해서 인 것 같아요.

문어네 노즈워크 가능하다고 해서 이걸로 샀는데 문어 주둥이에 사료 한 알 정도 들어가고 그거 먹으면 땡 아예 관심이 없어요. 며칠 간에 저만 엄청 노력하다가 끝났습니다..ㅋㅋ 다이소에서 낚시대 장난감 싼 걸로 시험해보시고 구매하시는 걸 추천드려요...

리뷰가 얼마 없기에 소신으로 작성해봅니다.
reviews.content_en: The design is so pretty and the durability is amazing, but my dog just won't play with it... I saved up my allowance to buy it and I'm so disappointed... I ended up giving it to my cat-owning friend ^.ㅜ My dog loves squeakers, crinkly sounds, and ball games, but with this it's hard to make the squeaker sound even when she jumps and bites it, and there's no crinkle, so the cost-benefit of running around doesn't justify it. I got the octopus thinking it could do nosework, but only about one kibble fits in the octopus's mouth, and once she eats it, she loses all interest. I tried hard for several days and gave up lol. I recommend testing with the cheap fishing rod toy from the dollar store first before buying this...

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
물고 늘어질 수 있는 장난감을 좋아하는 우리 강아지에게
딱 좋은 장난감이 출시되었다는 소문을 듣고 바로 결제!
역시나 너무 잘 가지고 놀아 주는 강아지 입니다~
혼자노는거 절대 싫어하는 강쥐라 힘들게 놀아줘야하는데 쇼파에 앉아서 흔들어 주기만 하면 되서 너무 간편해요!
reviews.content_en: Heard rumors that a toy perfect for our dog who loves toys that she can bite and stretch has been released, so I ordered right away! As expected, my dog plays with it really well~ Since my dog absolutely hates playing alone, I have to play hard with her, but now I can just shake it while sitting on the couch which is so convenient!

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content:
잘 가지고 놀까?
라는 의문으로 주문을 했어요.
와~~너무 잘 가지고 놀아요.
하나 더 주문 하려고 보니 행사가
끝났네요. ㅜㅜ
2살 첫째는 무서워해서 잘 못가지고
노는데 이제 1살된 둘째는 완전 
신이나서 잘 가지고 놀아요.

튼튼하지 않을까 걱정했는데
생각보다 튼튼해요.
물어 뜯고 잡아당겨도 아직
문제가 없어요.

행사 또 하게 된다면
재구매 하려고요.
저렴하게 잘 구매 했어요.
감사합니다.
reviews.content_en: I ordered it wondering 'would she even play with it?' And wow~~ she plays with it so well! I wanted to order another one but the sale ended ㅜㅜ My first 2-year-old was scared and doesn't play with it much, but now my 1-year-old second one is having a blast with it! I was worried it wouldn't be durable but it's surprisingly sturdy. Even with biting and pulling, there are no problems yet. If there's a sale again, I'll repurchase. Got a great deal, thank you!

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 뛰고 노는 걸 좋아하는 푸들 3살 어린이에여! 부모님이 애기 에너지를 감당하기 힘드셔서 ㅎㅎ 애기만 뛸 수 있는 장난감 발견하자마자 바로 이거닷!! 하고 구매 했는데 뷰모님도 애기도 서로 만족중입니다! 씹는걸 좋아해서 인형부분 뿐만 아니라 막대기 부분도 열심히 뜯고 씹고 맛보는 중입이다 ㅎㄹ
reviews.content_en: For a 3-year-old Poodle who loves running and playing! The parents were having trouble keeping up with the baby's energy hehe so as soon as we found a toy that lets the baby jump around, we bought it right away!! Both the parents and baby are satisfied! Since the baby loves chewing, she's been eagerly chewing on not just the figure part but the stick part too hehe

reviews.name: 루****
reviews.content: 쭉쭉 늘어나는 낚시대 장난감! 💙 평소에 파닥파닥 거리는거 좋아하는 강쥐라 딱일거라 생각했는데 역시나 좋아하네요! 낚싯대만 있으면 트리플 악셀까지 가넝.. 💃 평소에 집에서 혼자 뛰어다니는데 낚시대로 놀아주니 더 좋아하는거 같아요!! 뛰어다니면서 터그놀이하는 강쥐에게 추천합니다 :)
reviews.content_en: A fishing rod toy that stretches nicely! 💙 My dog usually loves fluttery things, so I thought it would be perfect, and she loves it! With just a fishing rod she's doing triple axels now.. 💃 She usually jumps around the house alone, but when I play with her using the rod, she seems to love it even more!! I recommend this for dogs who run around and do tug play :)

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content:
보자마자 자기꺼라는 걸 안듯 너무 좋아해요 ㅋㅋㅋ
새 장난감을 참 좋아하는데 이런 장난감 나무 막대기로 구매했었어요
근데 그립감이 썩 좋지 않아서 몇번 갖고 놀다가 말게 되었는데, 바잇미꺼는 귀엽고 그립감도 좋아서 저도 재밌게 놀아주게 되네요 ㅎㅎ
다양한 버전 있어서 저 파랑새가 망가지게 되면 다른 동물도 추가구매 하려구요!!
reviews.content_en: As soon as she saw it, she knew it was hers and loved it so much hehe She really loves new toys, and I used to get toys with wooden sticks, but the grip wasn't great so I'd stop playing with her after a few times. But BITE ME's version is cute and has a good grip so I have fun playing with her too hehe There are different versions so if the blue bird gets damaged, I plan to get other animals too!!

reviews.name: 콩****
reviews.content:
갖고있는 장난감은 실증내서 광고보자마자 구매했어요.
꺼내자마자 신나서 환장하네요. 줄이 늘어나서좋고 막대기도 고무라 좋아요.
reviews.content_en: She got bored of the toys she had so I bought it right after seeing the ad. She gets super excited the moment I take it out. The string stretches which is great, and the stick is rubber which is great too.

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content: 세일해서 저렴하게 특템했네요.제품이 아주 튼튼하게 만들어졌네요.문어 손사이에다가 간식껴서 놀아주니 쫄보 우리 강아지 너무 적극적으로 잘 노네요.아주 만족합니다.싸이트 다른 장난감도 한번 더 둘러보고 구매해야겠어요.제품아주 만족합니다
reviews.content_en: Got it on sale for cheap—a real steal. The product is very well made. When I put a treat between the octopus's arms and play with her, my usually shy dog is super enthusiastically into it. Very satisfied! I should check out other toys on the site and buy more. Very satisfied with the product.

reviews.name: 권****
reviews.content: 넘 귀엽고 재밌개 놀아요 장난감 좋아하는 친구들은 엄청 조아헐거같아요 할인핱때 구매하면 딱 조아요
reviews.content_en: So cute and fun to play with! Friends who like toys would probably love this so much! You'd love getting it during a discount sale hehe

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
친구 고양이 장난감에 눈독 들이길래 마침 강쥐 낚시대가 나와서 함 사줬더니 진짜 너무 잘 가지고 놀아서 엄청 만족해요🫶
그냥 들고만 있어도 혼자 왕왕 하고 물고 집중해서 귀여워요ㅋㅋ💗
reviews.content_en: My friend's cat had a toy I was eyeing so I got her the new dog fishing rod and she plays with it so well—I'm super satisfied! 🫶 She just holds it and barks to herself and bites it with focus, it's so cute hehe 💗

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 너무 재미있어해요~ 놀아주기도 편해요!! 우리 레오의 최애 아이템이 되었어요~ 색감도 예쁘고 부드러워요♡
reviews.content_en: She has so much fun with it~ It's easy to play too!! It's become Leo's favorite item~ The colors are pretty and it's soft ♡

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content:
마음에 들고 아이디어도 좋은 장난감인데, 저희 강아지가 예전에 막대기로 혼난 적이 있어서 무서워한다는 걸 깜빡했네요 ㅠㅠ
그래도 계속 시도하면서 놀아주다 보니 사진처럼 잠깐씩은 잘 놀 때가 있어요. 다만 터그놀이처럼 적극적으로 하지는 못하네요..ㅎㅎ

그래도 귀엽고 새로운 장난감이라 저는 만족해요! 혹시 막대기나 옷걸이 같은 걸로 강아지를 혼내신 적이 있다면, 구매 전에 한 번 고민해보셔도 좋을 것 같아요.
reviews.content_en: I like it and the idea is good, but I forgot that my dog was scared of sticks because she got in trouble with one before ㅠㅠ Still, I keep trying and playing with her and sometimes she plays well like in the picture. Though she can't do tug play as enthusiastically hehe. Still, it's cute and a new toy so I'm satisfied! If you've ever scolded your dog with sticks or clothes racks, you might want to think twice before buying this.

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content:
너무 귀엽습니다~~만족합니다!!!
다만, 저희 강쥐가 겁쟁이란 사실을 망각했습니다......
낚시대를 그냥 두면 끝에 장난감은 엄청
좋아하지만..막상 흔들어주면...
도망갑니다.ㅠㅠ 겁쟁이 너무 겁 먹지 말라고
천천히 .. 적응시켜서 사용해야겠습니다.
외면 중 ... 엄마 다리로 도망 중 ...
reviews.content_en: So cute~~~ I'm satisfied!!! But I forgot that my dog is a scaredy-cat...... If I just leave the fishing rod out, she absolutely loves the toy at the end, but when I actually shake it... she runs away ㅠㅠ Poor scaredy-cat, I need to slowly help her adapt and use it without scaring her. Currently avoiding... hiding behind mommy's legs...

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content:
제가 원하던 터그놀이 장난감입니다.
고양이 장난감 처럼 요리조리 할 수있는
장난감을 원했는데 바잇미에서 이렇게
귀엽고 튼튼한 장난감을 판매해 주셔서
너무 감사해요🩷🙇‍♀️
reviews.content_en: This is exactly the tug toy I wanted. I wanted a toy like cat toys that I could manipulate, and I'm so thankful that BITE ME sells such a cute and sturdy toy 🩷🙇‍♀️

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content:
우리 애기 ,, 환장템,,, 
살때 세트로 살걸 그랬어요,, 
문어 이미 터져서 재구매 해야함
그만큼 매일^^ 엄청 좋아하신다는거죠
놀아주기도 편해요 몸으로 놀아주다가 지치면 
낚시대 잡아서 팔만 움직이면 됨 이건 반려인 꿀템입니다
reviews.content_en: Our baby is obsessed with it... Should've bought it as a set... The octopus already tore so I need to rebuy. That's how much she loves it and plays with it every day ^^ It's easy to play too—when I get tired from playing with my body, I just grab the rod and move my arm, this is a lifesaver for pet owners!

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content:
너무 귀엽고. 멍뭉이가 넘 좋아해영 ㅋㅋㅋ
베프강아지한테 선물도 하거 ㅎㅎㅎ 
배송도 빠르고 최고!!!  더 좋은 제품 많이 만들어주세용 ㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: So cute and my puppy loves it so much hehe Also gave it as a gift to my best friend's dog hehe Shipping is fast too, best!!! Please make more great products hehe

reviews.name: 정****
reviews.content: 저희 강아지가 인형을 물고 와서 안주고 다시 가거든요 그래서 터그 낚시대 장난감을 사서 놀아줬더니 처음에 당황하더라구요 그런데 조금 있으니까 저랑 같이 재밌게 놀았습니다 장난감 찾으러 다시 안가도 되서 편합니다
reviews.content_en: My dog brings the figure to me and won't give it back, so I got a tug fishing rod toy and played with her, and she was confused at first. But after a while she played with me having fun! And I don't have to go looking for toys anymore which is convenient.

reviews.name: 조****
reviews.content:
이 귀여운 장난감을 어쩐담 ㅜㅜ...
너무귀여벙...
템션도좋고 내구성도 아주좋음요
reviews.content_en: How could there be such a cute toy ㅜㅜ... So adorable... Great tension and excellent durability.

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content: 진짜 너무 귀여워유 .. 터그놀이 좋아하는 우리 애기에게 안성맞춤 ㅜ 길어서 좋아요
reviews.content_en: Really so cute.. Perfect for our baby who loves tug play ㅜ It's long which is great.

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content: 엄청 좋아해요 시중에파는 고양이장난감은 약해서 하루면 끝났는데 이건 막대랑 줄 연결부분이 따로 잇어서 그런가 부러지는게 아니고 뺐다꼈다할수있어서 오래 가지고 놀수있을거같아요
reviews.content_en: She loves it so much! The cat toys you buy at stores break in a day, but this one has the stick and string connection as separate parts so it doesn't break and you can detach and attach it, so she can play with it for a long time.

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content: 바이트미 넘 유명하져 강아지가 넘 좋아해요 품질 마감 다 마음에 들어요
reviews.content_en: BITE ME is so famous, my dog loves it so much. I love the quality and finish of everything.

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content: 배송 빠르고 귀여워요 탄성이 좋네요~
reviews.content_en: Shipping is fast and it's cute! The elasticity is great~

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content:
고양이의 피가 흐르는지 낚시대 장남감을 엄청 좋아해요
강쥐용으로 튼튼하게 만들어진거 같아서 짱이에요
문어팔에 간식 끼워주니까 더 좋아합니다
reviews.content_en: My cat must have cat blood in them because they absolutely love this fishing rod toy! 😸 It seems really well-made and sturdy for strong dogs, which is awesome. It's even better when I stuff treats in the octopus tentacles!

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content:
젤리곰 삑삑이는 소리가 무서운지 좀 경계하더하고요 그리고 저희집 강아지는 아직 애기라서 젤리곰이 입에 물기엔 좀 크더라고요(크기 자체는 충분히 작은 사이즈예요)
울타리 생활 지겨워했는데 낚시대로 놀아주니 울타리 안에서도 신나게 놀아요ㅎㅎ 고양이 장난감 아닌가 싶었는데 강아지 장난감 맞네요😆
reviews.content_en: The jelly bear squeaky toy seemed to scare Geuljji a bit and they were cautious about it. Also, since my dog is still a puppy, the jelly bear is a bit too big to fit in their mouth (though the size itself is small enough). They were getting bored with the playpen, but now they play excitedly inside it with the fishing rod! 😆 I thought it was a cat toy, but it's definitely a dog toy!

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content:
이따가 놀아준다니까 가만히 못 냅둬요
노견이라서 요즘 날씨 너무 추워가지고 산책 자주 못나가서 장난감 사줬는데 자꾸 시비 걸고 싶을만큼 재밌나봐요 말티즈라서 그런지 나이들어도 놀려먹기 좋은 강아지(?)라서 간식 껴놓으면 낚시대로 집에서 이리저리 활동하게 하려고 일부러 문어만 샀어요 문어 앞손에 간식 껴넣을 수 있더라구요
reviews.content_en: They can't sit still when I say we're going to play soon! My pup is an old dog and the weather's been too cold lately so we can't go for walks often, so I got them this toy. They seem to find it so fun that they keep wanting to play! Since they're a Maltese, even with age they're fun to play with, so I deliberately bought just the octopus so I can stuff treats in its front tentacle and get them moving around the house with the fishing rod.

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content: 배송도 바로 당일에 왔고, 박스가 커서 놀랐네요ㅋㅋ 귀여워요!
reviews.content_en: The delivery came the same day, which was great! The box was huge though, haha 😂 It's adorable!

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content: 낚시대는 고양이만 사용하는줄 알았는데 너무 잘 놀아요. 문어도 귀엽습니다.
reviews.content_en: I thought fishing rods were just for cats, but my dog plays with it so well! The octopus is cute too.

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content: 예쁘고 강아지가 좋아해요.!상품 질도 좋습니다.
reviews.content_en: It's pretty and my dog loves it! The product quality is also great.

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content: 새로운 장난감만 좋아하고 고양이 장난감을 더 좋아하는 우리덕배는 매일 장난감을 뭘 사주지 고민하는게 일상인데 이런 좋은 장난감이라니.. 다른 고양이 장난감들은 캣잎든게 많아서 잘 안사주는데 이건 정말 좋아요 ㅠㅠ 보자마자 눈 돌아서 뛰고 난리에요 최고
reviews.content_en: Deokbae only likes new toys and prefers cat toys, so I'm always wondering what toy to buy next. But this is such a good toy! 😭 Most other cat toys have catnip in them so I don't usually buy those, but this one is really great. As soon as Deokbae sees it, their eyes go wild and they go crazy running around. The best!

reviews.name: 림****
reviews.content: 귀여우ㅏ요 강쥐가 좋아해요 배송도 빠르고 귯
reviews.content_en: It's so cute! 💕 My puppy loves it! Shipping was fast too!

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content: 바잇미 장난감 귀엽고 튼튼해서 좋아용
reviews.content_en: BITE ME toys are cute and sturdy, so I love them!

reviews.name: 한****
reviews.content:
너무 조아해요 
줄이랑 인형이라 
놀아주기도 나름 편해요 🐶🤍
reviews.content_en: I love it so much! 🐶🤍 Since it has a string and a figure, it's pretty convenient to play with too!

reviews.name: 강****
reviews.content: 너무 좋아해서 잠자리에까지 들고와요 빠른배송감사합니다ㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: They love it so much they even bring it to bed! 😆 Thanks for the fast shipping!

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content: 배송 빠르고 장난감 귀여워요
reviews.content_en: Fast shipping and the toy is adorable!

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content: 강아지가 너무 좋아해요 탄력있고 잘 늘어나요
reviews.content_en: My dog absolutely loves it! It's elastic and stretches really well.

reviews.name: 림****
reviews.content: 강쥐가 짱 조아해요 ㅠㅠ 너무귀여워요 굿
reviews.content_en: My pup loves it so much! 😭 It's so cute! Love it!

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content: 파랑새 넘 귀여워요 잘 놀아여
reviews.content_en: The bluebird is so cute! My dog plays with it so well!

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content: 너무 귀여워오 오자마자 인기
reviews.content_en: So adorable 🥰 It became an instant hit as soon as it arrived!

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content: 귀엽고 아주좋아해요
reviews.content_en: It's cute and we love it so much!

reviews.name: 한****
reviews.content:
너무 귀여워요ㅋㅋ
앉아서 놀아줄수있을까 싶었는데,
또 이걸들고 뛰어다니고 있는 저...😂

포장뜯은지 5분만에 게 삑삑이는 나갔어요.ㅜㅜ
삑삑이는 좀약한것같아용..
reviews.content_en: It's so cute! 😂 I wasn't sure if I could play with it while sitting, but here I am running around with it! 😂 The crab squeaker broke just 5 minutes after opening the package though 😭 The squeaker seems pretty weak...

reviews.name: 류****
reviews.content: 체력넘치는 개린이와 놀아주다 지친 부모님을 위해샀는데 이렇게도 쓸만하네요 ㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋ 근데 내구성이 너무 별로인것같아요 하루만에 이렇게됐어요 ㅜㅜ
reviews.content_en: I bought this for my high-energy young pup to tire out the exhausted parents, and it's actually pretty useful! 😂 But the durability doesn't seem very good at all. It fell apart after just one day 😭

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content:
사실 가격 정말 말도 안돼!!! 
장사꾼들 정말… 그치만 강아지가 너무 좋아함
하루종일 흔들어요 근데 입이 작은지 꽃게는 못 물고 자꾸 줄만 앙앙 물어. 귀엽다..
reviews.content_en: Honestly, the price is absolutely insane!!! These sellers really... 😤 But my dog loves it so much. They shake it all day! Though their mouth is small so they can't grab the crab and just keep biting the string instead. It's cute though! 🥰
